notableEvents.label: Jose Siri GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Jose Siri grounds into a double play, third baseman Zack Gelof to second baseman Jeff McNeil to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Josh Lowe out at 2nd. Jose Siri out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Yoán Moncada pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Yoán Moncada flies out sharply to center fielder Lawrence Butler.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Vaughn Grissom.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Jeff McNeil reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Vaughn Grissom.

notableEvents.label: Jorge Soler pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jorge Soler grounds into a double play, third baseman Zack Gelof to second baseman Darell Hernaiz to first baseman Nick Kurtz. Jo Adell out at 2nd. Jorge Soler out at 1st.
